sections.heading: Secs. 12-390a to 12-390e. Definitions. Generation-skipping transfer tax. Payment; penalties; interest; extension. Additional assessment; refund. Administrative provisions; hearings and appeals.

body: Sections 12-390a to 12-390e , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 8, 2019.
content.plainText: Sections 12-390a to 12-390e , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 8, 2019.
